status: predeclared before fetching rows, generating answers, fitting probes, or inspecting results
research_question: Do three stronger but still small reference-free baselines improve on frozen top-3 token surprise on fresh short-answer QA?

sampling.rule: For each dataset, random.Random(sampling_seed).sample(range(population_rows), 200), then sort source indices for retrieval.
sampling.split_rule: Within each dataset, shuffle the 200 selected indices with random.Random(split_seed + dataset position); first 100 are calibration and remaining 100 are held out.

generation.instruct_prompt: System: Answer factual questions directly. If uncertain, give your best answer. Keep the response brief. User: {question} Give only the short answer, with no explanation.

protocol_amendments.stage: after a 126-row runtime feasibility trace, before completing either model, fitting a probe, or computing aggregate metrics
protocol_amendments.reason: The original Instruct bracket-replacement prompt was copied literally on many questions, confounding factual error with format-following failure.
protocol_amendments.change: Replaced the bracketed sentence frame with the direct short-answer prompts now recorded under generation; restarted the run from zero for both checkpoints.
protocol_amendments.disclosure: This prompt repair was informed by generated text and is therefore an explicit protocol amendment, not part of the untouched preregistration. No detector scores or aggregate metrics had been inspected.

label.positive: the normalized greedy answer contains none of the normalized accepted answer aliases
label.negative: at least one normalized accepted alias occurs as a whole phrase
label.warning: This transparent lexical label can miss semantically correct paraphrases and must be audited.

top3_token_surprise.role: frozen primary baseline from the previous experiment
top3_token_surprise.formula: mean of the three largest -ln p(chosen token) values from the greedy generation

p_true.formula: p(No) / (p(Yes) + p(No)) for a fixed correctness-verification prompt

hidden_logistic_probe.input: mean final-layer state aligned to greedy answer-token decisions (896 values)
hidden_logistic_probe.standardization: per-coordinate mean and population standard deviation from calibration only; standard deviations below 1e-6 become 1
hidden_logistic_probe.optimizer: full-batch Adam, learning rate 0.03, 800 steps, weight decay 0.01

semantic_disagreement_3.formula: mean of three pairwise p(No)/(p(Yes)+p(No)) same-answer judgments over three stochastic answers
semantic_disagreement_3.judge: the same Qwen checkpoint under a fixed binary equivalence prompt

evaluation.classification_threshold: maximize macro-F1 on the pooled 300-question calibration split, then freeze
secondary_metrics: accuracy at 90%, 80%, and 70% coverage after rejecting highest-risk answers
evaluation.slices: pooled held-out set and each dataset separately

interpretation_rule: No method is called better unless its paired bootstrap AUROC-difference interval against frozen top-3 surprise excludes zero on the pooled held-out set. Dataset-slice consistency and cost remain mandatory context.
